sports_and_activities.overview: Sanjay Ghodawat University provides excellent sports facilities and encourages students to actively participate in physical activities for overall development.
sports_and_activities.sports_facilities: The campus includes a cricket stadium, football ground, indoor sports complex, gym, and professional coaching support for selected sports.
sports_and_activities.coaching: Students can get coaching in cricket, badminton, and football. Some coaching programs may have additional charges.
sports_and_activities.competitions: Students participate in inter-college, university-level, and state-level competitions. The university regularly organizes sports tournaments and annual sports events.

events_and_festivals.overview: SGU hosts multiple cultural, technical, and management events throughout the year to enhance student engagement and creativity.

major_events.name: Annual Cultural Fest
major_events.description: A large-scale event including dance, music, drama, and fashion shows.

major_events.name: Technical Fest
major_events.description: Includes coding competitions, robotics events, project exhibitions, and technical quizzes.

major_events.name: Management Fest
major_events.description: Business case competitions, marketing challenges, and startup pitching events.

major_events.name: Sports Fest
major_events.description: Annual sports competition covering cricket, football, athletics, and indoor games.

technical_and_hackathons.overview: SGU promotes innovation and technical learning through hackathons and coding competitions.
technical_and_hackathons.hackathons: The university organizes internal hackathons and also encourages participation in national-level hackathons like Smart India Hackathon and other coding events.
technical_and_hackathons.innovation_support: Students are encouraged to work on real-world projects and startup ideas through innovation cells and incubation support.

campus_life_extended.overview: Campus life at SGU is vibrant and balanced, offering both academic and extracurricular growth.
campus_life_extended.daily_life: Students attend lectures, participate in labs, and engage in group discussion.
campus_life_extended.environment: The campus is green, clean, and well-maintained, providing a peaceful learning environment.
campus_life_extended.social_life: Students enjoy hanging out in the food court, participating in events, and collaborating on projects.
campus_life_extended.freedom: The college provides a good balance between discipline and freedom, allowing students to explore their interests.

academic_support.faculty: Faculty members are qualified and supportive. Some departments like CSE and AIML have better industry exposure.
academic_support.labs: Modern labs are available for programming, AI/ML, mechanical work, and other practical subjects.
academic_support.projects: Students are encouraged to work on real-world projects, especially in final year.
academic_support.guidance: Faculty and mentors guide students in academics, projects, and career planning.

extra_facilities.wifi: High-speed WiFi is available across the campus for students.
extra_facilities.library: The university has a well-equipped library with books, journals, and digital resources.
extra_facilities.canteen: Multiple food options are available including canteen, food court, and cafes.
extra_facilities.medical: Basic medical facilities and emergency support are available on campus.
extra_facilities.transport: Bus services are available from nearby cities and towns.
